page_content:
Prerequisite: ANSC212, ANSC201 or BSCI440.

ANSC447 Physiology of Mammalian Reproduction Laboratory (1 Credit) Gross and micro-anatomy, artificial insemination, estrous cycle synchronization and invitro-fertilization procedures and analytical techniques useful in animal management and reproduction. Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in ANSC446.
